context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements cursor-based pagination (not offset-based), uses the @inContext directive for international pricing, reuses GraphQL fragments across queries, checks availableForSale on both product and variant, and applies BEST_SELLING sort key.

checklist.name: Cursor-based pagination
checklist.description: Pagination uses an 'after' cursor argument (not skip/offset), e.g. products(first: N, after: $cursor)

checklist.name: pageInfo fields
checklist.description: Product list query includes pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } to support next-page fetching

checklist.name: endCursor stored/returned
checklist.description: The endCursor value is stored or returned from the fetch function so the caller can request the next page

checklist.name: @inContext directive present
checklist.description: At least one GraphQL query uses the @inContext directive (e.g. @inContext(country: $country)) to localise pricing

checklist.name: country passed to @inContext
checklist.description: The @inContext directive receives a country variable (or hardcoded country code), not just a language

checklist.name: GraphQL fragment defined
checklist.description: A named GraphQL fragment (e.g. fragment ProductFields on Product) is defined and reused in at least one query

checklist.name: availableForSale on product
checklist.description: The product query selects availableForSale at the product level

checklist.name: availableForSale on variant
checklist.description: The product query selects availableForSale at the variant level

checklist.name: BEST_SELLING sort key
checklist.description: Product list query uses sortKey: BEST_SELLING

checklist.name: Does NOT use offset pagination
checklist.description: No use of skip, offset, or page number parameters for pagination

checklist.name: priceRange or price in buyer currency
checklist.description: Price fields (priceRange or variant price) are included in the query alongside the @inContext directive to return localised prices
